since_last: 35% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads -0.17%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: Markets closed — Independence Day (observed)
cards.body: US equity markets are shut for Independence Day (observed), so the tape is frozen at the previous session's close. Everything below reflects that last close — not live trading — and refreshes when the market reopens.

cards.headline: Last close: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.00% · BTC +1.81% · Gold +1.81% · Nasdaq100 -1.61%. At the last close, 35% of 89 AI names were green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure did the heavy lifting at -0.17%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -0.17%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -6.27%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -12.19%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +11.34%, ISRG +5.85%, AAPL +4.78%, HON +4.29%, ADBE +4.14%. Laggards: TER -12.19%, CEVA -11.18%, PUBM -10.77%, KLAC -10.59%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.19% at $160.99
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.19% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
